svg.title: Agents Using GitGuardian Skills
svg.desc: A white-background visual showing Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Kiro, Copilot, and Windsurf using GitGuardian agent skills to detect secrets before push.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif

svg.text: One security workflow, available from the coding agents developers already use.

g.text: apply instructions -> ggshield secret scan pre-push
